summary: Complete E2E testing of Landing Page rewrite and Trending Products page enhancements. All features verified working: new hero section, How It Works (3 steps), Winning Products section with live API data, Built For section (4 audiences), Pricing section (4 tiers), Testimonials (3), Final CTA. Trending Products page: category filters, 5 sort options, margin filters, enhanced product cards with confidence badges (Emerging Opportunity/Experimental), scores, margins, supplier costs, retail prices, and growth rates.

issues: Shows '0 high confidence' - this is correct based on data (no products with launch_score >= 75), but may look odd to users

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/trending-products returns 200 with products array
Backend: Products have all required fields: id, slug, product_name, category, image_url, launch_score, trend_stage, margin_percent, supplier_cost, retail_price, growth_rate, tiktok_views, detected_at
Backend: supplier_cost is numeric for all products
Backend: retail_price is numeric for all products
Backend: growth_rate is numeric for all products
Backend: tiktok_views is numeric for all products
Backend: launch_score is in 0-100 range
Backend: margin_percent is reasonable (-100 to 100)
Backend: Products have valid slugs for routing
Backend: limit parameter works (3 and 10 products)
Backend: GET /api/public/categories returns 200 with array
Backend: Categories have name, slug, count, avg_score fields
Backend: Category counts are positive integers
Backend: Category avg_score is in 0-100 range
Backend: Confidence score calculation logic valid
Frontend: Landing page loads at / with hero headline 'Discover Winning Products Before They Go Viral'
Frontend: Hero section has data-testid='hero-section'
Frontend: Hero CTA button 'Discover Trending Products' links to /trending-products
Frontend: How It Works section has 3 steps (01, 02, 03) with data-testid
Frontend: Winning Products section shows 6 product cards from live API
Frontend: Built For section has 4 audience types (Shopify, TikTok Shop, Dropshippers, Amazon FBA)
Frontend: Pricing section has 4 tiers (Free, Starter, Pro, Elite) with data-testid
Frontend: Testimonials section has 3 testimonials
Frontend: Final CTA 'Get Started Free' button present
Frontend: /trending-products loads with dark header showing stats
Frontend: Header shows products tracked, high confidence count, detected this week
Frontend: Category filter pills present with All button + 21 categories
Frontend: Category filter filters products (Electronics: 6 products)
Frontend: Sort dropdown has 5 options (Highest Score, Fastest Growing, Highest Margin, Newest, Lowest Cost)
Frontend: Sort by Lowest Cost, Margin, Newest, Growth all work
Frontend: Filters button expands margin filter panel
Frontend: Margin filter (50%+) filters products to 46
Frontend: Product cards show: score badge, confidence badge (Emerging/Experimental), stage badge
Frontend: Product cards show: margin %, supplier cost (£), retail price (£), growth rate
Frontend: Product card click navigates to /trending/:slug detail page

test_credentials.note: No authentication required - all tested pages and endpoints are public

seed_data_creation: None - used existing product data (50 products from API, 20 categories)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page and trending products features fully tested: (1) Landing page has hero with CTA, How It Works (3 steps), Winning Products (6 cards from API), Built For (4 audiences), Pricing (4 tiers), Testimonials (3), Final CTA. (2) /trending-products has dark header with stats, category filter pills (22 total), sort dropdown (5 options), Filters button with margin panel, product grid (50 products). (3) Product cards show confidence badges based on launch_score: Emerging Opportunity (50-74), Experimental (<50). Currently no High Confidence products (>=75) in data. (4) All filters/sorting work client-side. (5) Product card click navigates to /trending/:slug. No mocked APIs.

Landing Page Hero.details: Hero section with 'Early Trend Intelligence Platform' badge, headline 'Discover Winning Products Before They Go Viral', CTA button linking to /trending-products, secondary 'See How It Works' button.

How It Works Section.details: 3 steps with icons: (1) AI Scans Trending Platforms, (2) Detects Early Growth Signals, (3) Surfaces High-Margin Opportunities. Has data-testid attributes.

Winning Products Section.details: Shows 6 product cards fetched from /api/public/trending-products. Cards show product image, name, confidence badge, score, margin, supplier cost, retail price, growth rate.

Built For Section.details: 4 audience cards: Shopify Sellers, TikTok Shop Sellers, Dropshippers, Amazon FBA Sellers.

Pricing Section.details: 4 tiers: Free (£0), Starter (£19), Pro (£39, Most Popular), Elite (£79). All have CTA buttons and feature lists.

Testimonials Section.details: 3 testimonials from Sarah K., James M., Priya D. with 5-star ratings.

Category Filter.details: 22 category pills (All + 21 categories). Clicking filters products client-side. Electronics shows 6 products when selected.

Sort Dropdown.details: 5 options: Highest Score (default), Fastest Growing, Highest Margin, Newest, Lowest Cost. All work correctly.

Margin Filter.details: Filter panel with Any, 30%+, 50%+, 60%+, 70%+ options. 50%+ filter shows 46 products.

Product Cards.details: Cards show: score badge (top-left), confidence badge (top-right: Emerging Opportunity or Experimental), stage badge (Rising/Declining/etc), product name, category, margin %, supplier cost (£), retail price (£), growth rate.

Product Navigation.details: Clicking product card navigates to /trending/:slug detail page (e.g., /trending/mini-pocket-projector-1080p).

confidence_badge_distribution.note: 0 high confidence products is correct based on data - highest launch_score is 64

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB
